text:
Perfect! I've added comprehensive debugging that will help us identify the exact issue. Now when you run the approval scan, you'll see:

## 🔍 Debug Features Added

**Console Logs:**
- Chain ID and RPC URL being used
- Alchemy network and API call details
- Every token found from Alchemy (with address)
- Popular tokens from Relay
- First 10 token addresses to be checked
- List of all spenders being checked
- First 5 allowance checks in detail (token, spender, owner, result)
- Every approval found with full details
- Progress updates every 50 checks
- Errors for first 10 failed checks

**UI Debug Info:**
- Real-time status shown in the loading card
- Shows current progress percentage
- Shows number of approvals found so far

## 📋 What to Check

When you run it now, please check the browser console and tell me:

1. **How many tokens were found?** (from Alchemy and Relay)
2. **What are the first few token addresses?**
3. **Which spenders are being checked?**
4. **What do the first 5 allowance check results show?** (should show the allowance value)
5. **Any errors in the first 10 checks?**

This will help me identify if:
- Tokens aren't being found
- Wrong spenders are being checked
- RPC calls are failing
- Allowance checks are returning 0 when they shouldn't

Try it now and share what you see in the console!
